key_evidence: ENTITY-MAPPING FLAG: scanner slug democratic-republic-of-c must map to countries.json 'Democratic Republic of C' (composite 2.3, rank 181), NOT 'Republic of Congo' (composite 20.3, rank 149)
UN (May 2026): 26.5M facing acute hunger; 3.6M at emergency levels
New Ebola outbreak (Bundibugyo strain, high lethality) in Ituri province (Rwampara, Mongwalu, Bunia)
Only 23% of those targeted reached under the 2026 humanitarian response plan; Goma airport closed disrupting aid
3.59M internally displaced (N/S Kivu); Rwanda-backed M23 conflict continuing

data_hygiene_flag.recommendation: Add explicit slug field to the truncated 'Democratic Republic of C' countries.json entry to prevent substring mis-resolution.

methodology_note: Near-floor confirmation at 2.3 (above absolute 0.0 because harm is partly external/proxy-driven via M23/Rwanda and some UN-partnered relief structures nominally function). May 2026 evidence is continuation-and-deepening, not a discrete state-decision scoring event. Reconstruction of published dims = 2.3 (exact). No composite movement.
